children.text: Income, estate, and gift taxes, and taxes imposed by chapter 41, 42, 43, or 44, see sections 6502(a) and 6503(a)(1).
Employment and miscellaneous excise taxes, see section 6502(a).

children.heading: Delinquent collection officers
children.label: b Delinquent collection officers
children.text: For distraint proceedings against delinquent internal revenue officers, see section 7804(c).
Stamps, marks and brands, see section 6807.
Administration of real estate acquired by the United States, see section 7506.
